allow: Bash(python -c "import spin_glass_solvers as s; import numpy as np; G=s.generar_grafo_regular\(10,seed=1\); J,H=s.generar_instancia\(G,seed=1\); nb=s.construir_lista_vecinos\(G\); sp=np.ones\(10,dtype=np.int8\); print\('E=',s.energia\(sp,J,H,nb\)\); print\('dE=',s.delta_energia\(sp,0,J,H,nb\)\)")
